items.title: [100% Remoto]  - Python Developer - BotCity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

Company Overview

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.

## Descrição da vaga

The Python Developer will be responsible for design, develop, and deliver automation projects that ensure performance, scalability, and customer impact for BotCity’s clients. This role is critical to maintaining high-quality code, smooth delivery, and strong customer experience across Professional Services engagements. The ideal professional is a passionate Python developer who builds clean, reliable automation solutions, communicates effectively while prioritizing the customer experience, and thrives as a collaborative, adaptable team player in a fast-changing environment.  This role reports to the Delivery Manager.

## Local

Oportunidade 100% Remota.

## Requisitos

- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
- Professional experience (2+ years) in Python development.
- Relevant hands-on experience with automation or RPA projects.
- Proven experience with Git version control system and GitHub Flow.
- Solid understanding of APIs, data manipulation, error handling, and debugging.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to adapt quickly to new business contexts.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills with clients and internal stakeholders.
- Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion, Slack.
- Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
- Portuguese - Fluent.
- English - Advanced.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in professional services, IT consulting, or technical implementation.
- Familiarity with BotCity tools.
- Experience with Agile methodologies.
- Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.

## Benefícios

Competitive compensation.
Paid time off (30 days per year).
100% remote and flexible hours.
Caju benefits card.
Conexa health benefits.
Opportunity to work in a global team with teams in San Francisco and São Paulo.

## Contratação

Contratação PJ

## Como se candidatar

https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/6a19d88cd26f2200134fa876?src=Github
